children.text: The summer camp is over. The past seven days were hard but great.
children.cn: 夏令营结束了。过去的七天很辛苦但很棒。
children.statement: 夏令营一共持续了七天。
children.explanation: 文中提到 'The past seven days'。

children.text: It was very hot and our training was hard.
children.cn: 天气非常热，我们的训练很辛苦。
children.statement: 夏令营期间天气很凉爽。
children.explanation: 文中说 'It was very hot'（天气非常热）。

children.text: We walked and ran for hours.
children.cn: 我们走路和跑步了好几个小时。
children.statement: 训练中包括长时间的步行和跑步。
children.explanation: 文中说 'We walked and ran for hours'。

children.text: I was very tired on the first day.
children.statement: 作者在第一天感觉非常有活力。
children.explanation: 文中说 'I was very tired'（我非常累）。

children.text: But my teacher and friends were kind and helpful.
children.cn: 但是我的老师和朋友们都很友善，乐于助人。
children.statement: 老师和朋友们都很有爱。
children.explanation: 文中形容他们是 'kind and helpful'。

children.text: After the first day, I was much better.
children.cn: 第一天之后，我感觉好多了。
children.statement: 作者在整个夏令营期间都感觉很糟糕。
children.explanation: 文中说 'After the first day, I was much better'。

children.text: We also did many other things.
children.cn: 我们也做了许多其他事情。
children.statement: 夏令营里除了训练没有别的活动。
children.explanation: 文中明确说 'We also did many other things'。

children.text: On the third day, we cooked lunch on our own.
children.cn: 第三天，我们自己做了午饭。
children.statement: 学生们在第三天尝试了独立烹饪。
children.explanation: 文中说 'we cooked lunch on our own'。

children.text: We were not good at cooking, but we had a good time together.
children.cn: 我们不擅长做饭，但我们在一起玩得很开心。
children.statement: 虽然做饭不好吃，但大家很愉快。
children.explanation: 文中说 'not good at cooking, but we had a good time'。

children.text: What was the best dish? It was my "tomatoes with sugar"!
children.cn: 最好吃的菜是什么？是我的“糖拌西红柿”！
children.statement: 最棒的菜是糖拌西红柿。
children.explanation: 文中说 'It was my "tomatoes with sugar"'。

children.text: After the camp, we felt great. It was the feeling of growing up.
children.cn: 营期结束后，我们感觉棒极了。这就是长大的感觉。
children.statement: 作者觉得这次经历让他感受到了成长。
children.explanation: 文中说 'It was the feeling of growing up'。
